conj.statement: All tiers agree curriculum must *trace intellectual lineages* (e.g., “This 2020 civil rights lesson draws on Arendt’s *Origins of Totalitarianism*, but was revised post-2023 to include critiques by Black scholars like Denise Ferreira da Silva”). 2. **Faculty Agency**: 92% of state education directors (2026 NSBA survey) prioritize *teacher training* over top-down mandates for complex philosophy. 3. **Community Co-Design**: Counties with >50% community college involvement in curriculum review show 3.2× higher student engagement (Urban Institute, 2025).
conj.state_variations: (Ranked by deviation from national average in curriculum autonomy/ideological framing)*
